1.name: SW
1.description: Switching output of the regulator. Internally connected to source of the HS FET and drain of the LS FET.

2.name: SW
2.description: Switching output of the regulator. Internally connected to source of the HS FET and drain of the LS FET.

3.name: SW
3.description: Switching output of the regulator. Internally connected to source of the HS FET and drain of the LS FET.

4.name: SW
4.description: Switching output of the regulator. Internally connected to source of the HS FET and drain of the LS FET.

5.name: SW
5.description: Switching output of the regulator. Internally connected to source of the HS FET and drain of the LS FET.

6.name: CBOOT
6.description: Bootstrap capacitor connection for HS FET driver. Connect a high-quality 470-nF capacitor from this pin to the SW pin.

7.name: VCC
7.description: Output of internal bias supply. Used as supply to internal control circuits and drivers.

8.name: BIAS
8.description: Optional BIAS LDO supply input. TI recommends tying to VOUT when 3.3 V <= VOUT <= 18 V, or tie to an external 3.3-V or 5-V rail if available.

9.name: RT
9.description: Switching frequency setting pin. Place a resistor from this pin to ground to set the switching frequency. If floating, the default switching frequency is 500 kHz.

10.name: SS/TRK
10.description: Soft-start control pin. Leave this pin floating for a fixed internal soft-start ramp.

11.name: FB
11.description: Feedback input for output voltage regulation. Connect a resistor divider to set the output voltage.

12.name: NC
12.description: No internal connection. Connect to ground net and copper to improve heat sinking and board-level reliability.

13.name: NC
13.description: No internal connection. Connect to ground net and copper to improve heat sinking and board-level reliability.

16.name: PGOOD
16.description: Open drain power-good flag output. Connect to suitable voltage supply through a current limiting resistor.

17.name: SYNC/MODE
17.description: Synchronization input and mode setting pin. Tie to ground if not used.

18.name: EN
18.description: Enable input to regulator. Do not float. High = ON, Low = OFF.

19.name: AGND
19.description: Analog ground. Ground reference for internal circuitry.

20.name: PVIN
20.description: Supply input to internal bias LDO and HS FET. Connect to input supply and input bypass capacitors.

21.name: PVIN
21.description: Supply input to internal bias LDO and HS FET. Connect to input supply and input bypass capacitors.

22.name: PVIN
22.description: Supply input to internal bias LDO and HS FET. Connect to input supply and input bypass capacitors.

23.name: PGND
23.description: Power ground, connected to the source of LS FET internally. Connect to system ground.

24.name: PGND
24.description: Power ground, connected to the source of LS FET internally. Connect to system ground.

25.name: PGND
25.description: Power ground, connected to the source of LS FET internally. Connect to system ground.

26.name: PGND
26.description: Power ground, connected to the source of LS FET internally. Connect to system ground.

EP.name: DAP
EP.description: Low impedance connection to AGND. Connect to system ground on PCB. Major heat dissipation path for the device.

IQ_NONSW.conditions: VEN = 2 V, VFB = 1.5 V, VBIAS = 3.3 V external

VEN_VCC_H.parameter: Enable input high level for VCC output

VEN_VCC_L.parameter: Enable input low level for VCC output

VEN_VOUT_H.parameter: Enable input high level for VOUT

IBIAS_NONSW.parameter: Operating quiescent current from external VBIAS (non-switching)
IBIAS_NONSW.conditions: VEN = 2 V, VFB = 1.5 V, VBIAS = 3.3 V external

ILKG_FB.parameter: Input leakage current at FB pin

recommended_external_components.snippet: Enable input to regulator. Do not float. High = ON, Low = OFF. Can be tied to PVIN. Precision
respect to this pin. Connect to system ground on PCB.

The LM73605-Q1/6-Q1 step-down DC-DC voltage regulators. It is designed to operate with a wide supply
optimization, such as UVLO, programmable soft-start time, start-up tracking, programmable switching frequency,
The LM73605-Q1/6-Q1 designed to operate from an input voltage supply range from 3.5 V to 36 V. This input
supply must be able to withstand the maximum input current and maintain a voltage above 3.5 V at the PVIN pin.
The resistance of the input supply rail must be low enough that an input current transient does not cause a high
